biomes.name: Ashlands
biomes.description: A scorched expanse where the sun is a dull orange coin behind constant soot-fall.

biomes.name: Feylands
biomes.description: A dreamlike realm of oversaturated colors where the environment reacts to emotion.

biomes.name: Elven Forests
biomes.description: Gargantuan silver-barked trees in mountain vales, untouched by the passage of ages.

biomes.name: Dark Forests
biomes.description: Twisted, claustrophobic woods where the trees are watchers and the shadows have teeth.

biomes.name: The Barrens
biomes.description: A scarred landscape of rusted ruins and soured magic, filled with mutated life.

biomes.name: Crystal Canyons
biomes.description: Jagged ravines of translucent quartz that hum with a haunting harmonic frequency.

biomes.name: Fungal Grottos
biomes.description: Valleys of skyscraper-sized mushrooms and a thick, neon spore-mist.

biomes.name: The White Scar
biomes.description: A blindingly white crust of salt littered with the petrified remains of ancient seas.

biomes.name: Bladed Forests
biomes.description: A forest born of a battlefield where the trees are iron-wood and the leaves are razor-edges.

biomes.name: Ethereal Plains
biomes.description: Rolling hills of ghostly silver grass where the veil between life and death is thin.
